userId.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the running player

gameStateJson.description: Serialized GameState JSON to bypass deeply nested limits safely

currentStage.description: The current step in the political flow

gameVictory.description: Whether the campaign resulted in government coalition victory

endingTyp.description: Ending categorization type description if set

encounteredEventIds.description: List of categorical event IDs seen

leaderboardEntry.title: Leaderboard Entry
leaderboardEntry.description: A completed campaign's statistics submitted to the global hall of fame

photoURL.description: Optional profile photo vector avatar or URL

partyBarva.description: HEX code representing the political color code

initialPreference.description: Voter pool percentage from which the campaign took off

prefChange.description: Relative voter swing achieved in percentage points

seats.description: How many seats were captured in the 200-member Chamber

isGovernment.description: True if they forged or joined a supreme ruling coalition

endingTyp.description: Specific ending type of the game (premier, vicepremier, koalicni_partner, opozice)

date.description: Locally formulated date string of victory

users/{userId}/campaigns/active.description: The active campaign for a user mapped private per user
